sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32590" key="e)kpempte/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκπεμπτέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n32590.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that must be sent out,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.595c</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n32590.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐκπεμπτέον</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must reject,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:2:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.31</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
